raw_log_normalization: pulled via `rtk proxy gh run view --job <id> --log` and stripped the leading <job>\t<step>\t prefix per line.
notes: Workflow runs `just gen-all` (Justfile recipe) which calls `pnpm format`, but pnpm is not installed in the runner image. Failure: `sh: 1: pnpm: not found`, exit code 127, propagating through `error: Recipe format failed on line 221 with exit code 127` and `error: Recipe gen-all failed on line 32 with exit code 127`. Distinctive shape: 5-line failure block at the very end of a large log dominated by cargo-binstall listing all 200+ Rust crates (which is the bulk of the noise). Selected as Batch 2 case 3 (planned-mix deviation: github_actions_config rather than snapshot diff or timeout/OOM — those are harder to find via run-list hunting; biome's `pnpm: not found` is a representative github_actions_config case).
